playback_order: Noun plural or verb forms, slow
improvements: Universal PWA design for iPhone, Android, desktop, tablets, and modern browsers.
Voice check panel for German, US English, and Dari.
German speech rate reduced to slow.
English and Dari remain medium speed.
Synonyms are visible on the front of the card at the bottom.
Playback sequence now includes plural/forms between German and English by default.
Verb forms remain visible in the flip/answer view.
